name: Falafel (Hamilton)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the chickpeas overnight.
2. Drain and put them into a blender.
3. Add baking soda and salt to the blender.
4. Blend until you have a texture of fine breadcrumbs. Do not blend into a paste.
5. Empty the blended mixture into a bowl.
6. Add onion, cumin, coriander, garlic, pepper, lemon juice, and cayenne.
7. Mix gently with a fork. Do not pat down.
8. Heat oil in a wok to 2 inches deep.
9. Form the mixture into 18 patties, shaping them so they just hold together.
10. Fry the patties in hot oil until they are reddish brown on both sides.
11. Drain on paper towels.
12. Serve hot with tahini sauce stuffed in pita.
